output.final_answer: The populations of London, Paris, and Berlin are approximately 8.982 million, 2.1 million, and 3.8 million respectively. Berlin and Paris are the closest in size, with Berlin having around 3.8 million people and Paris having around 2.1 million people, a difference of about 1.7 million. Sources: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Demographics_of_Berlin, https://worldpopulationreview.com/cities/continent/europe, https://brainly.com/question/19212487
